description.value:
Trigger Gremmik Integrated rolls initiative

Effect The holograms flicker wildly and increase in brightness. The trap then rolls initiative.

details.description: Gremmik Integrated uses the holographic display from the center platform to distract and confuse one PC
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:18] to reprogram the display or @Check[thievery|dc:20] to turn it off entirely; three total successes are required.
details.routine:
The holographic display targets one creature within 20 feet of the platform, quickly displaying and changing graphs, logos, and videos. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:20|options:inflicts:off-guard,inflicts:dazzled] save, with the following results.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected by the holographic display and is immune to its effects.

Success The creature is unaffected by the holographic display.

Failure The creature is distracted by the holographic display and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] for one round.

Critical Failure The creature is fully invested in the information being displayed and is off-guard and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled] for one round.

Note: A DC for this ability was not provided by Paizo. A value of 20 has been used following the hazard building rules.
